shellCommands.command: pwd && sed -n '1,260p' src/useController.ts && grep -R "useController" -n src/__tests__/useController.test.tsx | head
git log --oneline -8 -- src/useController.ts; grep -R "_registerProps" -n src | head
git remote -v; git status --short; git log -S "_registerProps.current = control.register" --all --oneline -- src/useController.ts | head
printf '\n' >> src/useController.ts && git diff --check && git status --short
